feed.title: Alembic
feed.subtitle: Alembic is a starting point for Jekyll projects. Rather than starting from scratch, this boilerplate is designed to get the ball rolling immediately

entry.title: Multi-step curiosity driven learning
entry.content:
This project was an attempt to extend the paper Large-scale Study of Curiosity-Driven Learning by Peetak et. al. In particular, we attempted to improve the learning framework by allowing the agent to generate predictions of two-steps at a time instead of doing predictions one-step at a time.

This was a project developed for the course EECS 598 Deep Learning at University of Michigan in collaboration with Kushantha Attanayake,Ruchir Aggarwal, Dennis Li and Poorani Ravindhiran.

You can find the document with the final results here
entry.summary: This project was an attempt to extend the paper Large-scale Study of Curiosity-Driven Learning by Peetak et. al. In particular, we attempted to improve the learning framework by allowing the agent to generate predictions of two-steps at a time instead of doing predictions one-step at a time. This was a project developed for the course EECS 598 Deep Learning at University of Michigan in collaboration with Kushantha Attanayake,Ruchir Aggarwal, Dennis Li and Poorani Ravindhiran. You can find the document with the final results here
